body: Result: strengthened the existing replay/parity guard in crates/cairn-store/tests/cross_backend_parity.rs so TaskReadModel::get(...) and ApprovalReadModel::get(...) now prove backend-stable fields used by the enriched SSE surface (project, parent/run links, lease fields, title/description, version, created_at/updated_at, requirement/decision). Proof: cargo test -p cairn-store --test cross_backend_parity --features sqlite passed (16/16).
